nasb.text: By faith the walls of Jericho fell down after they had been encircled for seven days.

esv.text: By faith the walls of Jericho fell down after they had been encircled for seven days.

cnv.text: 因著信，耶利哥的城牆被圍繞了七天，就倒塌了。

ccb.text: 以色列人凭信心绕着耶利哥城走了七天，城墙就倒塌了。

csbs.text: 因着信，他们围绕耶利哥城七天，城墙就倒塌了。
